mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO gen_file_extract ( extract_mission_id, file_id, processed_doc_id, status_type, file_node_id, error_message, create_time, start_time, end_time, isdelete ) VALUES ( #{structureExtractionMission.structureExtractionMissionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{structureExtractionMission.sourceDocumentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{structureExtractionMission.processedDocumentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{structureExtractionMission.statusType,jdbcType=INTEGER,typeHandler=top.emilejones.hhu.pipeline.handler.MissionStatusHandler}, #{structureExtractionMission.fileNodeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{structureExtractionMission.errorMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{structureExtractionMission.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{structureExtractionMission.startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{structureExtractionMission.endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{structureExtractionMission.isDelete,jdbcType=INTEGER} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
file_id = #{structureExtractionMission.sourceDocumentId}, status_type = #{structureExtractionMission.statusType, typeHandler=top.emilejones.hhu.pipeline.handler.MissionStatusHandler}, processed_doc_id = #{structureExtractionMission.processedDocumentId}, file_node_id = #{structureExtractionMission.fileNodeId}, error_message = #{structureExtractionMission.errorMessage}, create_time = #{structureExtractionMission.createTime}, start_time = #{structureExtractionMission.startTime}, end_time = #{structureExtractionMission.endTime}, isdelete = #{structureExtractionMission.isDelete}

INSERT INTO gen_file_extract ( extract_mission_id, file_id, processed_doc_id, status_type, file_node_id, error_message, create_time, start_time, end_time, isdelete ) VALUES
( #{item.structureExtractionMissionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.sourceDocumentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.processedDocumentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.statusType,jdbcType=INTEGER,typeHandler=top.emilejones.hhu.pipeline.handler.MissionStatusHandler}, #{item.fileNodeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.errorMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.isDelete,jdbcType=INTEGER} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE file_id = VALUES(file_id), processed_doc_id = VALUES(processed_doc_id), status_type = VALUES(status_type), file_node_id = VALUES(file_node_id), error_message = VALUES(error_message), start_time = VALUES(start_time), end_time = VALUES(end_time), isdelete = VALUES(isdelete)
mapper.select: SELECT extract_mission_id, file_id, processed_doc_id, status_type, file_node_id, error_message, create_time, start_time, end_time, isdelete FROM gen_file_extract WHERE file_id = #{sourceDocumentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND isdelete = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC, status_type ASC, extract_mission_id DESC

SELECT extract_mission_id, file_id, processed_doc_id, status_type, file_node_id, error_message, create_time, start_time, end_time, isdelete FROM gen_file_extract WHERE extract_mission_id = #{structureExtractionMissionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND isdelete = 1
